title: Fix saveConfig to preserve explicit-zero calendar selection
description:
Current state: saveConfig() saves null when mSelectedCalendars is empty, collapsing default-all and explicitly-chose-0 into the same DB value.

Desired state: Save empty string when user explicitly selected 0 calendars. Save null only for the default/never-configured state.

File: WidgetListConfigureActivity.kt:146-150
Change: val calendarsStr = if (mSelectedCalendars.isEmpty()) null else ... to always save mSelectedCalendars.joinToString(',') (yields empty string for empty set, keeping null only for default).

Need a separate flag to know if user ever opened the picker, OR always save non-null once picker is touched.
